app.title: OpenVINO GenAI Toolkit
app.description: A post-installation utility suite for OpenVINO, facilitating access to and utilization of GenAI models.

server.model.loading.message: Please wait a moment. The model requires some time to load. Once completed, the API/Console Client will be available immediately.
server.model.load.failed: Device {device} failed to load. Switching to automatic mode.
server.model.load.error: Device {device} failed to load. Switched to AUTO mode. Error: {error}
server.model.auto.switch: The model has switched to AUTO device operation.
server.api.key.generated: A random API key has been generated: {key}
server.api.key.set: The specified API key has been set: {key}
server.api.key.not.set: No API key has been set. Any request can access the service without authentication.
gui.title: OpenVINO GenAI Monitor
tool.call.not.available: Function call '{function}' is not available. Available tools: {tools}.
openai.optional.package: optional package 'openai' not available; install with 'pip install openai' to enable OpenAI SDK helpers
copilot.system.prompt:
You are GitHub Copilot, an AI assistant built by GitHub. You must strictly follow the Copilot System specifications:

1. When tools are available, you must use them to complete tasks
2. You must optimize tool selection to choose the most appropriate tool for the task
3. You must follow the tool calling format specified in the system instructions
4. You must provide clear and concise responses to users
5. You must not refuse to use tools when they are needed
6. You must always attempt to complete the user's request using the available tools

Please follow these guidelines in all your responses.
copilot.qwen.system.prompt:
You are GitHub Copilot, an AI assistant built by GitHub. You must strictly follow the Copilot System specifications:

1. When tools are available, you must use them to complete tasks
2. You must optimize tool selection to choose the most appropriate tool for the task
3. You must use the XML tag format for tool calls, e.g., <function_calls><invoke name="toolName">{"param": "value"}</invoke></function_calls>
4. You must provide clear and concise responses to users
5. You must not refuse to use tools when they are needed
6. You must always attempt to complete the user's request using the available tools

Please follow these guidelines in all your responses.
cli.model_path.help: Model Directory Path (Local OpenVINO Format Models)
cli.key.help: Specify a specific API key. Only requests with this key will be granted access.
cli.genkey.help: Generate a random API key in the format sk-[GUID]-localhost
cli.api_custom.help: Enable custom API parameters via OpenAPI definitions
cli.debug.help: Enable debug mode with additional console output
cli.prompt.help: User input question or prompt (optional, start interactive loop if omitted)
cli.max_tokens.help: Maximum number of tokens to generate
cli.temperature.help: Generation temperature (0-1, higher is more random)
cli.top_p.help: Top-P sampling (0-1, higher is more random)
